fields.Name: T09 - Entity Form Create New Record
fields.Description: Navigates to the Members entity, creates a new member record by filling in required fields, then saves it. Validates the CRUD create workflow.

InputDefinition.goal:
IMPORTANT ENVIRONMENT NOTE: This application runs in a resource-constrained Docker environment and may take 10-30 seconds to load pages, initialize the workspace, or complete navigation transitions. If you see a loading screen, spinner, or blank page — DO NOT navigate away, go back, refresh, or retry login. Simply wait with increasing intervals (5s, then 10s, then 15s) until the content appears. The application WILL load; it just needs time. Only request judgement if you have waited over 60 seconds total on the same loading state with no change.

Navigate to Data Explorer and open the Members entity. Click the 'New' or 'Add' button to create a new record. Fill in the Name field with 'Regression Test Member', Email with 'regression-test@test.com', and any other required fields. Save the record. Verify that a save confirmation appears or the record shows up in the grid.

judgeValidationCriteria: Fields were populated with test data
Save operation completed (success indicator or record in list)
